text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers: A non-Iranian VLCC supertanker, capable of carrying around “2 million barrels” of crude and sanctioned by the US OFAC, has entered Iranian waters via the Strait of Hormuz with AIS active. The movement was identified and verified through…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Semi official Iranian media Fars reports a second bulk carrier loaded with food supplies has passed through the Strait of Hormuz and is heading towards Imam Khomeini Port. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 TankerTrackers：一艘非伊朗籍的超大型原油运输船（VLCC），载油量约为“200万桶”原油，且受到美国海外资产控制办公室（OFAC）的制裁，在AIS（船舶自动识别系统）开启的情况下，经由霍尔木兹海峡进入伊朗水域。该动向已通过……识别并核实。” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗半官方媒体法尔斯通讯社报道称，第二艘装载食品物资的散货船已通过霍尔木兹海峡，正驶向伊玛目霍梅尼港。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S. is weighing the deployment of up to 10,000 additional ground troops -- potentially including infantry, armor, and logistics units -- to West Asia (Middle East). This would add to the roughly 50,000 U.S. personnel already in the region, which includes multiple aircraft carriers and Marine units.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国正在权衡向西亚（中东）增派多达10,000名地面部队——可能包括步兵、装甲部队和后勤部队。这将增加该地区现有的约50,000名美军人员，其中包括多艘航空母舰和海军陆战队部队。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: We will continue to call the oppressor an oppressor, the bandit a bandit, and the murderer a murderer.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：我们将继续称压迫者为压迫者，称强盗为强盗，称杀人犯为杀人犯。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: I sincerely congratulate my dear friend Sánchez, the Prime Minister of Spain, for showing a firm stance in the face of the threats of Netanyahu, the butcher of Gaza.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：我衷心祝贺我的挚友、西班牙首相桑切斯，他在面对加沙屠夫内塔尼亚胡的威胁时表现出了坚定的立场。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: If there is to be peace in our region, it will be achieved despite this Zionist regime. If stability is to be established in our region, it will again be achieved despite the Israeli government acting with the delusion of the promised lands. If peace is to come to our blood-soaked geography, it will likewise come despite Israel, which ties its own security to the insecurity of others. Because whenever even the slightest hope for peace emerges, Israel will try every way to sabotage it, as it has done many times before. As the front of humanity strives to extinguish the fire in our region, the network of massacre will carry more wood to the flames. Of course, while doing this, they will continue to brazenly target countries that raise the voice of peace, especially Türkiye and Spain. With their hired pens, their media, and the pawns they use as instruments, they will try to silence people of conscience. But no matter what they do, they will not be able to silence brave hearts, nor will they be able to shackle the hearts that defend truth and justice.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：如果我们的地区要实现和平，那将是在无视这个犹太复国主义政权的情况下实现的。如果我们的地区要实现稳定，那也将是在无视那个怀揣“应许之地”妄想的以色列政府的情况下实现的。如果和平要降临到我们这片血流成河的土地上，那也将是在无视以色列的情况下实现的，因为它将自身的安全建立在他人的不安全之上。因为每当出现哪怕一丝和平的希望，以色列都会像过去多次那样，想尽一切办法进行破坏。当人类阵线努力扑灭我们地区的战火时，屠杀网络却在火上浇油。当然，在这样做的时候，他们会继续厚颜无耻地针对那些发出和平呼声的国家，特别是土耳其和西班牙。他们会利用雇佣的笔杆子、媒体以及他们当作工具的棋子，试图让有良知的人噤声。但无论他们做什么，都无法让勇敢的心沉默，也无法束缚那些捍卫真理与正义的心。

text: Turkish President Erdogan: The Israeli government, which is known to be dissatisfied with the ceasefire, should not be allowed to sabotage the process.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安：以色列政府对停火感到不满是众所周知的，绝不能允许它破坏这一进程。

text: 🇺🇸 The favorite pastime of woke MAGA diehards: whataboutism. Trump shares a post from some random Twitter nobody claiming the media had no issue portraying Obama as Jesus. Two problems: 1. Obama himself never posted anything like that. 2. Trump says it’s “a doctor, not Jesus”… so why the weak damage control? 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 觉醒派MAGA死忠粉最喜欢的消遣：诉诸虚伪（whataboutism）。特朗普分享了一位推特无名小卒的帖子，声称媒体在将奥巴马描绘成耶稣时毫无顾忌。有两个问题：1. 奥巴马本人从未发布过类似内容。2. 特朗普说那是“医生，不是耶稣”……那么为什么要进行这种无力的危机公关呢？🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian opposition media outlets report that the explosion that occurred on Imam Khomeini Street in west Tehran at around 23:40 on Tuesday was caused by an unknown device imploding next to two vehicles, opposite a checkpoint and near a Basij base. Reports are conflicting: opposition media cite locals saying some described the blast as one that was heard several streets away with shattered windows, while others say it was weak. Casualty figures have also varied—from one killed and one wounded, to one killed and five wounded, to no deaths and three wounded taken to the hospital. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗反对派媒体报道称，周二23:40左右，德黑兰西部伊玛目霍梅尼街发生的爆炸是由一个不明装置在两辆车旁引爆引起的，地点位于一个检查站对面，靠近巴斯基（Basij）基地。报道相互矛盾：反对派媒体援引当地人的话说，有人称爆炸声在几条街外都能听到，窗户都被震碎了，而另一些人则说爆炸威力很小。伤亡人数也各不相同——从一人死亡一人受伤，到一人死亡五人受伤，再到无人死亡三人受伤送医。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WaPo: The Pentagon is deploying thousands of additional troops to the Middle East as the Trump administration seeks to pressure Iran into a deal while preparing for possible renewed military action if the ceasefire collapses. Around 6,000 personnel are being sent aboard the USS George H.W. Bush and accompanying warships, with a further 4,200 troops from the Boxer Amphibious Ready Group, including the 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit, expected later this month. The influx of forces is expected to align with naval assets already in the region as the two-week ceasefire approaches its expiration on April 22. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华盛顿邮报》：五角大楼正在向中东部署数千名额外部队，因为特朗普政府试图在停火协议即将到期之际向伊朗施压，同时为停火破裂后可能恢复的军事行动做准备。约6,000名人员正随“乔治·H·W·布什”号航空母舰及其护航舰艇前往，另有来自“拳师”号两栖戒备群的4,200名士兵（包括第11海军陆战远征队）预计将于本月晚些时候抵达。随着两周停火期于4月22日临近结束，预计这批增援部队将与该地区现有的海军资产协同行动。@wfwitness

text: Zelensky: I feel that from the very beginning, Trump said he would remain in the middle. This shows that he is not on my side, neither mine nor Russia’s side. His signals are more positive towards Russia than towards Ukraine.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我感觉到从一开始，特朗普就说他会保持中立。这表明他既不站在我这边，也不站在俄罗斯那边。他发出的信号对俄罗斯比对乌克兰更积极。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Arrest of separatist terrorist group leader; Mossad-linked network dismantled Iran’s Intelligence Ministry announced that 35 individuals linked to terrorism, separatism, arms smuggling, and Mossad were identified and arrested across 6 provinces, preventing planned attacks. - Leader of a separatist group linked to Israel arrested in Isfahan - 4 members of two arms-smuggling cells from Iraqi Kurdistan arrested; 42 weapons seized - 30 mercenaries tied to U.S.-Israeli (including Mossad) networks detained across multiple provinces
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 分离主义恐怖组织头目被捕；摩萨德关联网络被摧毁。伊朗情报部宣布，在6个省份识别并逮捕了35名与恐怖主义、分裂主义、武器走私和摩萨德有关联的人员，阻止了计划中的袭击。- 在伊斯法罕逮捕了一名与以色列有关联的分离主义组织头目 - 逮捕了两个伊拉克库尔德斯坦武器走私团伙的4名成员；查获42件武器 - 在多个省份拘留了30名与美以（包括摩萨德）网络有关的雇佣兵

text: Open Source Intel IDF: A terrorist crossed the Yellow Line in northern Gaza and "approached the troops in a manner that posed an immediate threat." Troops eliminated the operative immediately after identification. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列国防军（IDF）：一名恐怖分子越过了加沙北部的黄线，并“以构成直接威胁的方式接近部队”。部队在确认身份后立即消灭了该武装人员。推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel Foreign Ministry: Equating a sovereign UN member state with a jihadist terrorist organization is yet another proof of the UN Secretary-General’s failure. The UN has failed to disarm Hezbollah and failed to uphold its own Security Council Resolution 1701. Hezbollah is the enemy of both Israel and Lebanon, serving as the Iranian regime’s proxy to dominate Lebanon. Antonio Guterres should stand firmly behind genuine Israel–Lebanon peace efforts, not offer excuses for Hezbollah. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）以色列外交部：将主权联合国成员国与圣战恐怖组织相提并论，是联合国秘书长失职的又一证明。联合国未能解除真主党的武装，也未能维护其自身的第1701号安理会决议。真主党既是以色列的敌人，也是黎巴嫩的敌人，是伊朗政权统治黎巴嫩的代理人。安东尼奥·古特雷斯应该坚定支持真正的以黎和平努力，而不是为真主党找借口。推文

text: The Spectator Index The US military is 'sending thousands of additional troops into the Middle East in the coming days', according to Washington Post report. tweet
text_zh: 《旁观者指数》（The Spectator Index）据《华盛顿邮报》报道，美国军方“将在未来几天向中东增派数千名士兵”。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah Lawmaker Fadlallah: We want a comprehensive ceasefire, no return to near-daily Israeli strikes and assassinations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）真主党议员法德拉拉（Fadlallah）：我们想要的是全面停火，而不是回到几乎每天都有以色列空袭和暗杀的状态。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump tells ABC he does not think there is a need to extend the ceasefire with Iran. "I think you are going to see two amazing days, I really think so." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044345554050707585/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）特朗普告诉美国广播公司（ABC），他认为没有必要延长与伊朗的停火协议。“我认为你会看到令人惊叹的两天，我真的这么认为。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044345554050707585/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated U.S. Vice President Vance stated that ending the funding for Ukraine is one of the decisions he is most proud of during this administration's term. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044343548460368105/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译（WarTranslated）美国副总统万斯表示，停止对乌克兰的资助是他本届政府任期内最引以为豪的决定之一。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2044343548460368105/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated "Witkoff and Kushner have confirmed their visit to Ukraine." - Zelenskyy. The President added that an exact date for the visit has not yet been set, but Ukraine is waiting for them "at any time when they are ready." tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译（WarTranslated）“维特科夫（Witkoff）和库什纳（Kushner）已确认他们将访问乌克兰。”——泽连斯基。总统补充说，访问的具体日期尚未确定，但乌克兰正在等待他们，“随时准备好随时欢迎”。推文

text: Open Source Intel HERO FOOTAGE 🔴 In Pauls, Oklahoma, Principal Kirk Moore is seen confronting and subduing a school shooter, helping save students’ lives. He is currently recovering from injuries. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044342327452238290/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）英雄画面 🔴 在俄克拉荷马州保尔斯（Pauls），校长柯克·摩尔（Kirk Moore）被拍到与一名校园枪手对峙并将其制服，帮助挽救了学生的生命。他目前正在从伤势中恢复。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044342327452238290/video/1 推文

text: Togo Pushes UN to Ditch Distorted World Map Showing Africa Smaller than its Real Size Foreign Minister Robert Dussey urged UN states to replace the Mercator map with Equal Earth projection that shows Africa smaller that it really is, aiming to reflect Africa’s true size & challenge long-standing distortions shaping global perception. READ MORE
text_zh: 多哥敦促联合国放弃扭曲的世界地图，该地图显示非洲比其实际面积小。外交部长罗伯特·杜塞（Robert Dussey）敦促联合国成员国用“等积地球投影”（Equal Earth projection）取代墨卡托投影地图，该地图显示非洲比其实际面积小，旨在反映非洲的真实大小并挑战长期以来塑造全球认知的扭曲观念。阅读更多

text: NEW: The U.S. is deploying about 10,000 additional troops and multiple warships to the Middle East to increase pressure on Iran. This includes aircraft carriers and Marine units, adding to roughly 50,000 U.S. personnel already in the region. Officials say the military buildup gives the U.S. more options if talks fail, including possible strikes or even ground operations. Source: WaPo
text_zh: 最新消息：美国正在向中东部署约10,000名额外部队和多艘军舰，以加大对伊朗的压力。这包括航空母舰和海军陆战队部队，增加了该地区现有的约50,000名美军人员。官员们表示，军事集结为美国在谈判失败时提供了更多选择，包括可能的打击甚至地面行动。来源：《华盛顿邮报》

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇦🇪 Iran has vehemently rejected a UAE-backed proposal adopted by the International Maritime Organization (IMO) on establishing a so-called “safe maritime corridor” in the Strait of Hormuz, slamming it as legally-groundless and politically-motivated
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇦🇪 伊朗强烈拒绝了阿联酋支持并被国际海事组织（IMO）采纳的关于在霍尔木兹海峡建立所谓“安全海上走廊”的提案，抨击其在法律上毫无根据，且具有政治动机。

text: 🇦🇪 The UAE has abandoned its migrant workforce. Following the start of military aggression against Iran, thousands of migrant workers in Dubai have been left stranded, unable to leave the country. Workers from India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, and the Philippines—who form the backbone of the UAE’s economy—are now facing layoffs, wage cuts, or forced unpaid leave, according to Tasnim News. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇦🇪 阿联酋抛弃了其外籍劳工。在对伊朗的军事侵略开始后，成千上万在迪拜的外籍劳工被困，无法离开该国。据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，来自印度、巴基斯坦、孟加拉国、斯里兰卡和菲律宾的劳工——他们是阿联酋经济的支柱——现在正面临裁员、减薪或被迫无薪休假。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 According to a Financial Times investigation, Iran significantly strengthened its military capabilities by acquiring a Chinese surveillance satellite. Leaked Iranian military documents indicate that the satellite, designated TEE-01B, was obtained by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Aerospace Force in late 2024 after being launched from China. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 据《金融时报》调查，伊朗通过获取一颗中国监视卫星，显著增强了其军事能力。泄露的伊朗军事文件显示，该卫星代号为TEE-01B，由伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队于2024年底从中国发射后获得。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 More satellite images of the runway used by U.S. special forces to evacuate the pilot of an F-15E fighter jet that crashed in Iran show the wreckage of two HC-130J aircraft and two MH-6 Little Bird helicopters , which were destroyed by special forces to prevent them from falling into Iranian hands, according to U.S. claims.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 更多卫星图像显示了美军特种部队用于撤离在伊朗坠毁的F-15E战斗机飞行员的跑道，图像中可以看到两架HC-130J飞机和两架MH-6“小鸟”直升机的残骸，据美方称，这些飞机是被特种部队摧毁的，以防止它们落入伊朗手中。

text: 🇮🇷 Iran has been intensively removing debris from the entrances to its underground missile facilities, as seen in satellite images of Tabriz and Khomein published by Soar Atlas. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 据Soar Atlas发布的塔布里兹和霍梅因的卫星图像显示，伊朗一直在密集清理其地下导弹设施入口处的碎片。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇰🇵 ⚡️ IAEA Chief Warns of "Very Serious" Surge in North Korea's Nuclear Weapons Production Capacity
text_zh: 🇰🇵 ⚡️ 国际原子能机构（IAEA）负责人警告称，朝鲜核武器生产能力出现“非常严重”的激增

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 ⚡️ Zionist Ambassador to the US rejects French assistance in Lebanon talks
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 ⚡️ 犹太复国主义驻美大使拒绝法国在黎巴嫩谈判中的协助

text: Open Source Intel Iran used a Chinese spy satellite to target U.S. military bases across the Middle East, according to the Financial Times. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）据《金融时报》报道，伊朗利用中国间谍卫星瞄准了中东各地的美军基地。推文

text: Open Source Intel Talks with Hamas over disarmament are progressing at a very slow pace -Kan https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044339685699231797/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）与哈马斯关于解除武装的谈判进展非常缓慢 - Kan https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044339685699231797/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel ALERT 🔴 IDF to residents south of the Zahrani River in southern Lebanon: Evacuate immediately and move north of the river. Airstrikes ongoing, heavy operations in the area. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044339645438198251/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）警报 🔴 以色列国防军（IDF）向黎巴嫩南部扎赫拉尼河（Zahrani River）以南的居民发出通知：立即撤离并向河以北移动。空袭正在进行中，该地区有大规模行动。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044339645438198251/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A terrorist attempted to stab IDF soldiers between Yakir and Revava in Samaria and was neutralized by gunfire. No casualties reported. - Israeli media tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）一名恐怖分子试图在撒马利亚的亚基尔（Yakir）和雷瓦瓦（Revava）之间刺伤以色列国防军士兵，随后被开枪击毙。未报告有人员伤亡。- 以色列媒体推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @yarotrof : Trump lashing out at Meloni is the best thing that can happen to her politically. Given how toxic Trump (and Netanyahu) are across the political spectrum in Italy, closeness to both had become an albatross around her neck. https://www.corriere.it/esteri/26_aprile_14/trump-contro-meloni-papa-64037787-b0ad-4708-88c9-f50519e2dxlk_amp.shtml tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix）转发 @yarotrof：特朗普抨击梅洛尼是她在政治上能遇到的最好的事情。鉴于特朗普（和内塔尼亚胡）在意大利整个政治光谱中是多么令人反感，与他们两人的亲近已成为她脖子上的枷锁。 https://www.corriere.it/esteri/26_aprile_14/trump-contro-meloni-papa-64037787-b0ad-4708-88c9-f50519e2dxlk_amp.shtml 推文

text: Open Source Intel We will keep an eye out, it may be turned around on the way out. INTERESTING: The sanctioned crude oil tanker “ALICIA” has passed through the Hormuz via the Islamic regime-controlled toll route between Hormuz Island and Larak Island. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044336724277350620/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）我们会密切关注，它可能会在离开的路上被掉头。有趣的是：受制裁的原油油轮“ALICIA”号已通过霍尔木兹海峡，经由伊斯兰政权控制的霍尔木兹岛和拉拉克岛之间的收费航线。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044336724277350620/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: The Spectator Index Israeli military issues evacuation order for large parts of southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044338041217818934/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 《旁观者指数》（The Spectator Index）以色列军方对黎巴嫩南部大片地区发布了撤离令。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044338041217818934/photo/1 推文

text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）有趣的是：受制裁的原油油轮“ALICIA”号已通过霍尔木兹海峡，经由伊斯兰政权控制的霍尔木兹岛和拉拉克岛之间的收费航线。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044336724277350620/photo/1 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @ReutersCommods : Exclusive: US will not renew waiver on Iranian oil as it mounts pressure on Tehran, sources say https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-allow-waiver-iran-oil-expire-administration-sources-say-2026-04-14/ tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨（Michael A. Horowitz）转发 @ReutersCommods：独家：消息人士称，美国在向德黑兰施压之际，将不会延长对伊朗石油的豁免。 https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-allow-waiver-iran-oil-expire-administration-sources-say-2026-04-14/ 推文

text: Nuno Felix https://x.com/BulwarkOnline/status/2044219874239525308/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix） https://x.com/BulwarkOnline/status/2044219874239525308/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Israeli occupiers continue their aggressions against villages and towns in southern Lebanon, and in their latest crime, they targeted a vehicle carrying humanitarian aid
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 以色列占领者继续对黎巴嫩南部的村庄和城镇进行侵略，在他们最新的罪行中，他们袭击了一辆运送人道主义援助物资的车辆

text: Open Source Intel Sen. Lindsey Graham: "I'm actually okay with the way Trump is talking to a bunch of terrorists. I could care less what words he uses. I want outcomes. Delaying the negotiations or extending the ceasefire, that could be a mistake. We'll comply with the law of war, but all hell's about to break loose on this regime. He's offering them the ability to exist as a nation, not as a state sponsor of terrorism. No moratorium on enrichment. I will not support that. Enrichment has to be none. I don't trust Iran when it comes to enrichment. The 900 pounds of highly enriched uranium needs to be in our control." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）参议员林赛·格雷厄姆（Lindsey Graham）：“我实际上并不介意特朗普与一群恐怖分子交谈的方式。我不在乎他用什么词。我想要结果。推迟谈判或延长停火可能是一个错误。我们将遵守战争法，但这个政权即将大难临头。他给他们提供的是作为一个国家存在的能力，而不是作为一个恐怖主义支持国。不会有浓缩铀的暂停。我不会支持这一点。浓缩铀必须为零。在浓缩铀问题上，我不信任伊朗。那900磅高浓缩铀必须由我们控制。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🤣🇺🇦🇺🇸🇮🇷We would like to help with the unblocking of the Strait of Hormuz, however, so far America has not approached us with such a request - Zelensky "We already have experience of a blockade in the Black Sea, we could help" Americans are constantly in…" 🇺🇦 Kiev is experiencing such a shortage of Patriot missiles that "it couldn't be any worse," - Zelensky. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🤣🇺🇦🇺🇸🇮🇷我们愿意帮助解除霍尔木兹海峡的封锁，然而，到目前为止，美国还没有向我们提出这样的请求——泽连斯基‘我们已经有了黑海封锁的经验，我们可以提供帮助’美国人一直在……” 🇺🇦 基辅正经历着“再糟糕不过”的爱国者导弹短缺——泽连斯基。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Jan Fada, For Iran More than 25.4 million Iranians have registered for the “ Jan Fada, For Iran ” volunteer campaign, a state-backed initiative launched in late March 2026 to signal readiness to defend the country against American-Zionist aggression. “Jan Fada” (meaning “self-sacrifice”) allows citizens to sign up online as a symbolic show of support -- it is not conscription , but a commitment expression of national solidarity promoted through media and SMS. Many Senior officials and heads of institutions have also joined, including President Masoud Pezeshkian and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf , both declaring their readiness to sacrifice their lives for Iran.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Jan Fada, For Iran（为伊朗献身）超过2540万伊朗人注册参加了“Jan Fada, For Iran”志愿者运动，这是一项于2026年3月下旬发起的国家支持的倡议，旨在表明准备抵御美以侵略。“Jan Fada”（意为“自我牺牲”）允许公民在线注册，作为一种象征性的支持展示——这不是征兵，而是通过媒体和短信宣传的民族团结承诺表达。许多高级官员和机构负责人也加入了该运动，包括总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬和议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫，两人都宣布准备为伊朗牺牲生命。

text: 🤣 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 We would like to help with the unblocking of the Strait of Hormuz, however, so far America has not approached us with such a request - Zelensky "We already have experience of a blockade in the Black Sea, we could help" Americans are constantly in contact with Iran and they don't have time for Ukraine - Zelensky 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🤣 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 我们愿意帮助解除霍尔木兹海峡的封锁，然而，到目前为止，美国还没有向我们提出这样的请求——泽连斯基“我们已经有了黑海封锁的经验，我们可以提供帮助”美国人一直在与伊朗接触，他们没有时间管乌克兰——泽连斯基 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: British Finance Minister Rachel Reeves: I feel very frustrated and angry that the U.S. went into this war without a clear exit plan. This is a war that we did not start. It was a war that we did not want. Without a clear idea of what they were trying to achieve. As a result, the Strait of Hormuz is now blocked. Source: The Mirror
text_zh: 英国财政大臣雷切尔·里夫斯（Rachel Reeves）：我感到非常沮丧和愤怒，美国在没有明确撤军计划的情况下卷入了这场战争。这是一场我们没有发起的战争。这是一场我们不想要的战争。他们根本不知道自己想实现什么。结果，霍尔木兹海峡现在被封锁了。来源：《镜报》

text: Spain approved a plan to grant legal status to about 500,000 undocumented migrants, offering them a one-year renewable residence permit. To qualify, applicants must have lived in Spain for at least five months and have no criminal record. Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez called it an “act of justice” and said the move is needed to support Spain’s ageing economy. Source: BBC
text_zh: 西班牙批准了一项计划，给予约50万无证移民合法身份，为他们提供一年可续签的居留许可。要获得资格，申请人必须在西班牙居住至少五个月且无犯罪记录。首相佩德罗·桑切斯称此举是“正义的行为”，并表示这是支持西班牙老龄化经济所必需的。来源：BBC

text: A BBC undercover investigation revealed that staff at a government hospital in Taunsa, Pakistan, reused syringes on children, likely causing a major HIV outbreak. Between November 2024 and October 2025, at least 331 children tested positive for HIV, with more than half the cases linked to contaminated needles.
text_zh: BBC的一项卧底调查显示，巴基斯坦陶恩萨（Taunsa）一家政府医院的工作人员在儿童身上重复使用注射器，这很可能导致了一场大规模的艾滋病毒爆发。在2024年11月至2025年10月期间，至少有331名儿童艾滋病毒检测呈阳性，其中超过一半的病例与受污染的针头有关。

text: Türkiye's ROKETSAN shows successful test firings of its KARAOK short-range anti-tank missile in four scenarios, all direct hits. The tests demonstrated fire-and-forget guidance and armor-piercing tandem warhead performance. KARAOK has similar role as systems like US Javelin or Russian Kornet. Max effective range: ~2,500 meters. Effective from very close range (~76 m) to near maximum.
text_zh: 土耳其ROKETSAN公司展示了其KARAOK短程反坦克导弹在四种场景下的成功试射，全部直接命中。测试证明了其“发射后不管”的制导能力和串联战斗部的破甲性能。KARAOK的作用与美国“标枪”或俄罗斯“短号”等系统类似。最大有效射程：约2,500米。从极近距离（约76米）到接近最大射程均有效。

text: Zelensky: Americans are constantly in contact with Iran and have no time for Ukraine. If the war lasts longer, there will be fewer weapons for Ukraine.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：美国人一直在与伊朗接触，没有时间管乌克兰。如果战争持续时间越长，乌克兰的武器就会越少。

text: Zelensky: The Strait of Hormuz is blocked, and we want to unblock it. We already have experience from the blockade of the Black Sea. America has not asked us yet. Source: ZDF
text_zh: 泽连斯基：霍尔木兹海峡被封锁了，我们想解除封锁。我们已经有了黑海封锁的经验。美国还没有要求我们。来源：ZDF

text: Marjorie Taylor Greene: The current center right and left coalition in America has put us $40 trillion in debt. They’ve funded foreign war after foreign war after foreign war, and now they’re funding another one, with no idea how long it will last. It’s gotten to the point where Americans can’t afford life.
text_zh: 玛乔丽·泰勒·格林（Marjorie Taylor Greene）：美国目前的中右翼和左翼联盟让我们背负了40万亿美元的债务。他们资助了一场又一场的外国战争，现在他们又在资助另一场，却不知道这场战争会持续多久。现在已经到了美国人负担不起生活的地步了。
